title: Building an Institutional-Grade Yield Forecasting Model
situation: Responsible for reviewing and assessing capital markets investment strategy across strategy, micro, macro, and portfolio dimensions.
obstacle: Evaluating a large institutional portfolio required synthesizing inputs across multiple teams while determining whether existing investment policy and metrics were fit for long-horizon decision-making.
action: Implemented key performance metrics with defined ranges and reviewed the Investment Policy Statement for strategic soundness. Led research linking demographic factors to long-term interest rate and equity yields, producing a proprietary model mapping age disbursement to future yield profiles.
result: Strengthened the capital markets strategy framework and produced a durable analytical tool—still in personal use—that provides a demographic lens for long-term asset allocation decisions.
